reviews.review_description:
Rarely do I give a 5 star rating. This game is tons of fun. The instant this is a full release it's mine! Love the piloting, love the straight forward gameplay ( although more missions and a campaign mode in the release will of course be appreciated), and love the environments.
It's also oddly relaxing, like going for a drive, but with new places to discover.

developer_response.body: Thanks oberon.todd.9 👍

reviews.review_description: Loved the demo, this game scratches a very specific itch. Only thing I would ask for is the option to flip the control orientation so I can have the stick on the right and throttle on the left.

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it Lazy_Robot!  Thanks for the suggestion about flipping controls.  I'm not sure we'll get that done for the first release of the game, but will make a note of it for later updates

reviews.review_description: Neat little demo. Looking forward to a full game release. Will come back to it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks!  Full game coming very soon.  Don't forget to wishlist it on the Meta Store 
https://www.meta.com/en-gb/experiences/5768528353244808

reviews.review_description: Great game at. 61 only just started playing any kind of computer games been waiting for VR  for years. This is the kind of game that VR is made for keep going and looking forward very much to the finished game

developer_response.body: Thanks Russell - very glad you enjoyed it!  The full game will be coming out later this year

reviews.review_description: Good demo

developer_response.body: Thanks

reviews.review_description: It’s a fun game where you are inside a space shuttle. You navigate through space picking up debris. Sounds simple but it’s fun. Easy controls.

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it StephenDavar.  The full game will be coming out later this year.

reviews.review_title: Little gem for Space pilot adventurers.
reviews.review_description:
I'll cut to the chase .. when in the ETA on release date please?  

Space Savage was one of the first games I played when I got into VR last year and now coming back to it, I apprective all the makings of what a great little game it can be.  First run on a Quest 2 and now Quest Pro.  

Intuitive controls, funny, hidden things to find ... wanting to know about the story line etc.  Haptic controls options would be nice.  Also personally, an option in taking my hand off the grip for accelerator for full stop or slowing down to full stop would be nice.   I tried the option for "manual rotation" (IIRC) but didn't notice a difference? 

 I'm hoping for more buttons in the cockpit too.  Whether they do an actually function or a funny noise, I don't care.   Hoping rockets or laying own mines etc for more destructible stuff.   Assembling tasks would be great too.   I guess I'll just have to wait.  👍

developer_response.body:
Hi Fucqer - its great to hear that you're excited for the full game.  I'm very pleased to let you know that it is now, officially "Coming Soon" on the Meta Store

https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/5768528353244808

Please add it to your wishlist so that you'll be the first to know when its finally released (soon soon!)

reviews.review_description:
Oh PLEASE release this SOON!! I cannot wait! This is one of the coolest games I've demoed, and the feel of piloting through space is exactly what I'm looking for. Such simple game play, yet amazingly effective in every way! Humorous, great graphics, and I'm tapping my toe in anticipation! Love it!!! 
UPDATE: Really hoped to get in the testing mode, but alas didn't get it in time. Still waiting for this, but it's taking a while. The anticipation is getting old, but they need to make it good, so I get it.

developer_response.body: Hah!... sorry you missed the testing phase Sheazzz11 (we might have another one later so keep your eyes peeled!).

reviews.review_description: I hope it will be officially released soon since I really liked it a lot!!.  do you have a release date?

developer_response.body: Thanks MushuAzul.  The full game will indeed be released soon.  Sorry I can't give you the actually date just yet

reviews.review_description: Zipping around in the ship is awesome!

developer_response.body: Thanks

reviews.review_description: This game is incredible! The concept of being given a mission in space after a terrible accident is amazing. I can't wait to play the full game!

developer_response.body: Thanks - glad you liked it

reviews.review_description: Demo is fun!    Looking forward to the full game!    Would like to see drifting, as you would in space, and using the stick to stop forward or back motion.    That function seems to be automatic at present.  When you go 0 thrust motion stops.

developer_response.body: Thanks Swaybar.  Yes - we tried more "realistic" space physics (no drag) but it was just too hard to control and nausea inducing in VR, so we've gone for something a bit easier to control

reviews.review_description:
Was totally hooked from the moment the game started, great graphics, interesting and fun game play! 
The feeling of really sitting in a small salvage pod cockpit with breathtaking visuals all around you. The feeling of  immersion is A++
Smooth easy controls and easy to to master, flying at speed through the asteroid field and around the abandoned space station is marvelous!. Loved the hunt for the 10 hidden cargoes to retrieve and the fight with the space pirate at the end. I can't recommend this demo enough. When the full game is released this is a sure thing and a must have!

developer_response.body: Thanks Bryghtblade - hope you're enjoying testing the Community Alpha build of the game!

reviews.review_description: Love flying around!

developer_response.body: Thanks

reviews.review_title: Can't wait for the full game!
reviews.review_description: Can't wait for the full game, keep up the good work!

developer_response.body: Thanks Fox116074

reviews.review_description: Can’t wait for the full game to come out.

developer_response.body: Thanks banana!  Thanks for helping testing the Community build of the game!

reviews.review_description: I’ve already played 3 times now and on my third time I just chilled and messed around with all the buttons and imagined what they could all do love the game gonna but it for sure once it’s out

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it RadGaming101.  Have you tried collecting all the hidden pickups in one go?  That's a real challenge!

reviews.review_description:
I'm the kind of gamer that's too critical to appreciate alot of great games and this one impresses me beyond any expectations....   The controls of the ship, asthetics even how combat works all feels just so f***ing fresh and amazing.   

I love this

my only complaint is I can't buy the full title right now.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much 85303 - very glad you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_title: Super hyped for the full release
reviews.review_description: This looks really promising, definitely purchasing as soon as it releases or preordering if possible.

developer_response.body: Thank you Darthplonkusvr! We really appreciate it and hope you enjoy the early access when it comes out!

reviews.review_description: I was surprised how simple and fun the game actually was, I really liked how it felt sitting and piloting the spaceship with your arms. I'm looking forward to the full release as this game is one of those fun little treasures with lots of potential for joy!

developer_response.body: Thanks ONYXFINALSHOT - very glad you found it easy enough to pick up!
